title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan uses Claude Code to ship 600,000 lines of code in 60 days, identifying four key strategies: role assignment, parallel sessions, custom tools, and pre-planning. The video references Tan's open-source gstack system and claims one strategy is generating online criticism while another represents a significant advancement.
